calendar.matters: ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Sep-03-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
David Simon appeared via zoom for and with Francis Yamat, Petitioner.
Guadalupe Gamino appeared via zoom for and with Frian Hernandez Yamat, Sr., Objector.

Mr. Simon stated that his client has filed a supplemental declaration to properly identify surviving children of the predeceased son of Flordeliza Raganit Hernandez.

Petition for Letters of Administration by Francis Yamat is taken under submission with the intent to grant.

Petition for Letters of Administration by Frian Yamat is taken under submission with the intent to deny.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: A. Datt. Not Reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION, Appointment Under IAEA
Off Calendar Aug-12-2025 Off Calendar

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Jul-15-2025 Continued To Aug-12-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Jun-24-2025 Continued To Jul-15-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar May-27-2025 Continued To Jun-24-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Francis Yamat, Petitioner in Pro Per.
Guadalupe Gamino for and with Frian Hernandez Yamat, Sr., Objector.

The Court addressed a recently filed objection to the Petition for Letters of Administration. Mr. Gamino stated that the objection was based on concerns about the Petitioner's trustworthiness and indicated that Frian Hernandez Yamat intends to file a competing petition seeking his own appointment as Administrator. Francis Yamat confirmed that there are eight siblings, and stated that six of them support his appointment as Administrator.

Following discussion, the Court continued the matter to June 24, 2025, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204, to allow time for objector to file their competing petition.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar May-06-2025 Continued To May-27-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
